immutable_core.semantic_intent: microbiology antibiotic susceptibility leaf under an organism branch
immutable_core.semantic_definition: A microbiology antibiotic-susceptibility leaf asset at specimen-test-organism-antibiotic grain, preserving raw antibiotic name, raw interpretation code, standardized interpretation class, dilution context, and linkage to the parent organism branch and test event.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per microbiology susceptibility leaf row
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_microbiology_antibiotic_susceptibility must preserve susceptibility leaf semantics and must not silently become antibiotic administration, prescription intent, organism isolate, parent culture event, infection phenotype, or antibiogram summary.

microbiology_entity_contract.entity_grain: one row per microbiology specimen-test-organism-antibiotic susceptibility leaf
microbiology_entity_contract.source_hierarchy_rule: retain antibiotic susceptibility rows beneath organism branches and parent specimen-test events
microbiology_entity_contract.parent_child_rule: link each susceptibility leaf to microbiology_organism_branch_id and microbiology_test_event_id
microbiology_entity_contract.raw_text_retention_rule: retain raw antibiotic name, raw interpretation code, raw dilution text/comparison/value, and raw comments
microbiology_entity_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained susceptibility leaf means no approved susceptibility row under the source rule, not absence of organism, culture, antibiotic exposure, or resistance

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_microbiology_antibiotic_susceptibility outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
